---
id: insert-rows-into-data-space-table
title: "Insert rows into data space table"
description: "Insert one or more rows into a table in a data space. The datasource must belong to the authenticated user."
sidebar_label: "Insert rows into data space table"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Insert rows into data space table"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/data-spaces/{datasourceId}/insert-rows"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Insert one or more rows into a table in a data space. The datasource must belong to the authenticated user.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
